text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm having a meeting with Eishin Flash, when...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My apologies. I woke up with a headache this
morning...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes, there is no cause for concern.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I took medication thirty minutes ago. It should
take effect momentarily.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: The pain should be gone by 5 p.m. at the latest...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She tries to put on a tough face, but the pain
doesn't subside. Worse, she's plagued by
headaches for a while after that.
